# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Stabilized and unignored the seven requested tests. Signal/process tests now use bounded polling/explicit child-exit synchronization instead of fixed timing assumptions. Multi-repo orphaned lease repair now treats missing physical lease records as repairable orphaned task references while preserving corrupt/wrong-type lease records as quarantine signals. Panel supporting-record failure cleanup now removes leaked payload/artifact pairs when a supporting write fails, allowing the formerly ignored cleanup test to run. Existing unrelated ignores were left in place and now have explanatory comments.","outstanding_risks":[],"steps":[{"order":0,"status":"completed","description":"Inspected the ignored test inventory under src/ and tests/ and mapped the seven target tests to their owning code paths."},{"order":1,"status":"completed","description":"Unignored and stabilized cli::run::tests::kill_tracked_descendant_processes_survives_parent_exit by adding an explicit parent-rel
